fields.title: Personal Portfolio — edlynexavier.com
fields.tagline: My professional personal website, built from scratch with Django + Bootstrap 5.
fields.description:
A fully custom personal portfolio site built from scratch using Django, Bootstrap 5, and PostgreSQL. This project is the reflection of my full-stack development ability.

Key features include dynamic project management via Django Admin, SEO-optimised pages with JSON-LD structured data (Person, WebSite, SoftwareSourceCode), a functional contact form with honeypot anti-spam, breadcrumb navigation, sitemap.xml, robots.txt, and full production deployment configuration.

The frontend is built with a custom dark design system using CSS variables, Syne + DM Sans typography, smooth CSS animations, IntersectionObserver-driven scroll effects, and a fully responsive layout from mobile to desktop.

Deployment-ready with WhiteNoise for static files, Gunicorn for WSGI, environment variable management via python-dotenv, and clean separation of dev/prod settings.
fields.meta_description: Personal portfolio of Edlyn Exavier — built with Django, Bootstrap 5, and PostgreSQL.

fields.title: Inventory Management System
fields.tagline: A web-based stock and inventory tracking system for small businesses.
fields.description:
A full-stack inventory management web application built with Django and PostgreSQL. Designed for small businesses needing a clean, reliable solution for tracking stock, suppliers, and purchase orders.

Features include multi-user access with role-based permissions (admin, staff, viewer), real-time stock level tracking, low-stock alert thresholds, product category management, supplier records, CSV export functionality, and a responsive dashboard with Chart.js visualisations.

The application uses Django's class-based views, custom model managers for filtered queries, Django signals for alert triggers, and Bootstrap 5 for the responsive UI. Authentication is handled via Django's built-in auth system with custom permission decorators.
fields.meta_description: Web-based inventory and stock management system built with Django and PostgreSQL.

fields.title: IoT Temperature Monitor
fields.tagline: Arduino-based ambient monitoring system with real-time web dashboard.
fields.description:
A hardware + software bridge project combining an Arduino Uno microcontroller with DHT22 temperature/humidity sensors to monitor environmental conditions in real time.

The Arduino reads sensor data every 30 seconds and transmits it over serial USB to a lightweight Python backend server. The backend stores readings in a SQLite database and exposes a REST API. A minimal web dashboard (HTML, JS, Chart.js) displays live and historical data with configurable alert thresholds.

Key technical components: Arduino firmware in C++, Python serial listener with pyserial, Flask-based REST API, SQLite for time-series storage, and a single-page dashboard with auto-refreshing charts. The system also includes a simple email alert system using smtplib when thresholds are exceeded.
fields.meta_description: IoT temperature monitoring system combining Arduino sensors with a Python web dashboard.

fields.title: Task Manager CLI Tool
fields.tagline: A fast, keyboard-first command-line task manager built in Python.
fields.description:
A command-line productivity tool for managing daily tasks, built entirely in Python with a clean, interactive interface using the Rich library for styled terminal output.

Supports creating, listing, filtering, updating, and deleting tasks. Tasks are stored locally in a JSON file for portability. Features include priority levels (low, medium, high, urgent), due dates with overdue highlighting, category/tag filtering, and a summary dashboard view.

Built as a learning project to explore CLI design patterns, argument parsing with argparse, and terminal UI composition with Rich. Published to PyPI as a personal open-source project.
fields.meta_description: Python command-line task manager with styled terminal output using the Rich library.

fields.subtitle: College / Institution Name, Canada

fields.title: Full-Stack Web Developer
fields.subtitle: Freelance / Independent Projects
fields.description: Designed and built multiple full-stack web applications from scratch using Python and Django. Implemented REST APIs, relational database schemas, user authentication, admin interfaces, and production deployments. Delivered projects on time with clean, maintainable codebases.
